headline: Clorox (CLX) Valuation Check After Mixed Recent Share Price Performance
summary: What recent performance data suggests about Clorox (CLX) Clorox (CLX) has drawn fresh attention after a mixed run in its share price, with a negative 1 year total return alongside a gain in the past 3 months and year to date. See our latest analysis for Clorox. At a share price of US$112.15, Clorox has seen short term momentum cool, with a 1 month share price return of 6.22% decline after a 90 day gain of 9.06%, while the 1 year total shareholder return of 20.85% decline highlights that...

headline: Defense Lifts Moat Stocks As Tech Stumbles
summary: Moat Index gained 2.13% in February, outperforming the S&P 500 by nearly 3 percentage points as defensive rotation favored its equal-weighted, valuation-conscious approach.

headline: Hidden Valley Ranch Europe Push Tests Clorox Brand Relevance Strategy
summary: Hidden Valley Ranch, owned by Clorox, has launched the Hidden Valley Ranch-bassador Program in Europe. Selected fans will travel across European destinations and share ranch dressing pairings with local foods through social content. The program focuses on experiential marketing and user generated content to promote the Hidden Valley Ranch brand.
